_comment_intensity: intensity = base_intensity + intensity_per_down * (down_number - 1), capped at max_intensity
_comment_ledge: Ledge grabs trigger a shock at this fraction of normal intensity/duration
_comment_duration: One entry per difficulty: [Easy, Normal, Hard, Expert]
_comment_log: Set steam_drive to the drive letter Steam is on (e.g. C, D, E). Or set console_log_path to a full path to override auto-detect entirely.
_comment_cooldown: Minimum seconds between shocks (prevents rapid-fire on multi-hit events)
_comment_dry_run: When true, prints what WOULD be sent but does not call the API. Use this to test the pipeline.
